query:
SELECT 
  id,
  awayTeam,
  homeTeam,
  startTimeEst,
  awayML, homeML,
  awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread,
  bookTotal, overOdds, underOdds,
  awayRunLine, homeRunLine,
  awayRunLineOdds, homeRunLineOdds,
  modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
  awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread,
  modelTotal, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds,
  modelOverRate, modelUnderRate,
  modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore,
  publishedToFeed, publishedModel
FROM games
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-27'
  AND sport = 'MLB'
  AND id IN (2250021, 2250022, 2250023, 2252293)
ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute

FROM games

  AND id IN (2250021, 2250022, 2250023, 2252293)
ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC
